title: Instructional Excellence at Morgan — Pedagogy Seminar Slides (Dorsey-Elson)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-11-07 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Instructional Excellence at Morgan' presented by Laura Dorsey-Elson, PhD. Original pedagogy seminar that opened the series prior to the 2023-2024 two-part Instructional Excellence sequence. Companion 'Links Listing' .docx resource distributed alongside. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/lhN9lFGdz-yVhuceTDwbJQSQ1vL5UaBI8PXfP45u24hC9hNuFO3vQupETkIu1KvB.nQ9N1h7iG7H2YONK
